statement: In every magma, Equation 685 (`x = y * (x * ((y * z) * w))`) implies Equation 1809 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * x) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0152
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op y z) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w x) w))
